## Outcome

Describe the launch-site or waitlist behavior improved by this change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`

## Evidence

List the tests, synthetic fixtures, or screenshots that demonstrate the change.

## Privacy and scope boundaries

- [ ] No credentials, waitlist exports, patient information, or production analytics are included.
- [ ] Database writes remain parameterized.
- [ ] The site is not represented as a functioning EHR or clinical decision system.
